title: DaynNightVote
description: A plugin which allows people to vote for either day or night
body:
🌓 Democratic Time Control for Minecraft Servers 🌓

Experience the power of democracy on your Minecraft server with this elegant voting system that allows players to collectively decide between day and night! ☀️🌙

This lightweight yet feature-rich plugin empowers your community to take control of the server's time cycle through a simple voting mechanism. When darkness falls and monsters appear, or when players need sunlight for their builds, a quick vote can change the world to meet everyone's needs!
✨ Key Features:

    Intuitive Command System - Simple /dnvote day or /dnvote night commands make participation easy for all players
    Real-time Vote Tracking - Dynamic boss bar shows voting progress with customizable colors and text
    Configurable Settings - Adjust vote duration, messages, and visual elements to match your server's style
    Permission-based Access - Control who can vote, start votes, and check vote status
    Tie-breaking Logic - Fair resolution when votes are evenly split
    Multi-world Support - Changes apply across all server worlds simultaneously

🛠️ Why Choose This Plugin?

Unlike other time-control solutions that give absolute power to admins or rely on complex economy systems, this plugin creates a balanced, community-driven approach to time management. It encourages player engagement and creates fun moments of server-wide decision making!

Server owners will appreciate the clean, optimized code that won't impact performance, while players will love having a voice in how the world around them functions. The attractive boss bar and customizable messages keep everyone informed about active votes without cluttering the chat.

Perfect for survival servers where balancing day/night activities is important, or creative servers where builders need specific lighting conditions. Give your players the gift of democratic time control today and watch your community engagement soar! 🚀~~~~
